label: Lenswake Bedroom
description: Lenswake Bedroom serves as a sleeping alcove calibrated to the residence’s time-banded twilight, with mirrored slits set high to admit copper-white light in measured bars. Faceted vitrified tiles sheath the walls, their scored grounding channels feeding a sealed undersill cistern that arrests electrostatic glass dust before it reaches bedding. A low sleeping platform of fused silicate anchors the room, flanked by recessed niches designed to keep surfaces clear and instruments stowed flat. The ceiling carries a shallow lens-panel that refracts faultlight seam-lines into a steady, navigationally legible glow.
